name: Peanut Butter and Jelly French Toast
directions: Spread peanut butter on 4 slices of bread; spread jelly on other 4 slices of bread.
Put one slice of each together to form sandwiches.
In mixing bowl, lightly beat eggs; add milk and salt and mix together.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Dip sandwiches in egg mixture, coating well.
Place in skillet and brown both sides.
Serve immediately.

name: Buttermilk French Toast
directions: Beat eggs.
Beat in buttermilk, almond extract and seasonings.
Dip bread in batter, turning to coat both sides, and cook on a lightly oiled skillet until both sides are golden.
Delicious topped with apple sauce, powdered sugar or syrup.

name: French Toast
directions: Boil milk with sugar and essence.
Remove from heat.
Set aside.
Soak bread slices in milk for a few seconds without letting bread fall apart.
Then dip bread slices one at a time in beaten eggs.
Heat butter in a pan.
Fry the slices in the butter.
When golden in colour, turn the bread slices over and cook the other side.
Arrange the slices in a serving dish.
Sprinkle some castor sugar over the slices.
Serve warm.

name: Vegan French Toast
directions: Mix together the first 5 ingredients.
Dip a piece of bread in the mixture and cook on a skillet until it's golden-brown.
Repeat until you have as many as you want.

name: French Toast
directions: Beat the egg in a bowl until light and fluffy.
Add the milk and mix well.
Stir in the sugar.
Then, dip each bread slice in this mixture.
Heat oil in a pan.
Fry the bread slices one by one in the hot oil, until cooked on either side.
Remove from pan, drain out excess oil on paper towels and serve hot.
Enjoy!

name: Eggless French Toast
directions: Mash bananas in a bowl.
Add soy milk, molasses or maple syrup, and cinnamon.
Stir well.
Soak bread slices in mixture. Fry in lightly oiled skillet. Lightly brown both sides.
Top with your usual french toast toppings.

name: Cinnamon French Toast
directions: Slice cinnamon bread thickly.
Crack the eggs into the shallow dish. Add milk & vanilla. Whisk well.
Following the whisking, add a few shakes of ground cinnamon to the egg mixture. Soak each slice of bread in the mixture on both sides until all of the liquid is absorbed.
Have a griddle greased with cooking spray ready and place the soaked bread on it. (frying pans work as well) Cook until the bread is golden brown on each side, flipping in between.
Serve warm with maple syrup, fresh fruit, or whatever you prefer.
ENJOY!

similar.name: Orange French Toast Made With Cinnamon Bread

name: Best Ever French Toast
directions: in a large bowl combine eggs, cinnamon, sugar, vanilla, ginger.
Beat with whisk till blended, slowly add milk as desired consistency (you don't want it to be to eggy or too runny).
Heat griddle or skillet to medium to medium high heat, melting the butter in pan.
Now this is tricky you don't want the bread to absorb too much liquid you just want to QUICKLY
Coat both sides of your bread with the mixture.
Make sure the cinnamon is nice and clumpy on top. You can also sprinkle on cinnamon while cooking.
Brown both sides and serve IMMEDIATELY with butter and hot syrup.
Enjoy.

name: French Toast Casserole
directions: Pre-heat oven to 375.
Whisk eggs in large bowl.
Add milk and mix well.
Chop french toast slices into 1/2 inch cubes and add to egg mixture.
Add chicken, cheese and parsley, mix well.
Pour into greased 13"x9" baking pan.
Cook 35 minutes, eggs should be fully cooked.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
In sauce pan add berries and honey.
Cook on medium heat until hot.
Pour into blender and blend until all is a liquid.
Pour into  a serving cup and you can use this as a topping for the casserole.
Cut casserole into your families portion size and enjoy.

similar.name: French Toast Casserole With Honey Glazed Fruit

name: Nana's Easy French Toast
directions: Preheat nonstick pan on stove at medium high heat.
Pour 3/4 cup of vanilla soymilk into bowl.
Break 2 large eggs into same bowl and mix with vanilla soymilk.
Sprinkle enough cinnamon to cover surface.
Dip slice of whole wheat bread into bowl. Three seconds for each side.
Place slice of dipped whole wheat bread onto pan.  Usually I place two slices at a time into heated pan.
Once bottom side of whole wheat bread is medium brown in color, flip the slice of bread in pan.
Once second side of bread is also medium brown in color, remove from pan.
Serve with real 100% maple syrup.

name: French Toast Corners
directions: Cut each slice of bread twice diagonally to make each slice into 4 triangles.
Beat together eggs, milk, vanilla and cinnamon.
Dip the bread slices into egg mixture.
Heat butter over medium-high heat in a frying pan or skillet.
Cook bread until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite topping.

name: Creamed Eggs on Toast
directions: Melt butter (approximately 1/3 c) in a medium sized sauce pan.
Once butter is melted, add flour until the combination forms a loose ball.
Add milk a little at a time until it is as thin as you would like it (use no more than about one cup or it will be too thin) sauce will thicken a little if left standing--stir constantly.
Once done adding milk, add chopped up eggs to sauce.  If you want it thicker, wait a little bit before serving.
Serve on toast and eat (salt and pepper to taste).

name: Perfect French Toast
directions: Combine eggs, half and half, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon.
Fry butter in large skillet over medium heat.
Dip bread in mixture and place in skillet.
Brown bread on both sides (about 3 minutes on each).
Serve with syrup, fruit, whipped cream, or your favorite topping!
Enjoy.;).

name: Overnight Oven French Toast
directions: Pour melted butter into bottom of baking sheet to coat.
Beat next 7 ingredients together well.
Dip both sides of each bread slice into egg mixture.  Pour any remaining mixture over slices.  Cover and refrigerate overnight.  Can be frozen at this state.
Uncover and bake in 400 F oven on bottom rack for 25 to 30 minutes.
Place on rack to cool.
Dust with icing sugar when warm, if desired.
NOTE:  Commercial eggnog can be substituted for milk for a richer, or more festive, flavour.

name: French Toast
directions: crack the eggs into a small bowl.
put a splash the milk into the same bowl.
dipp the bread into the egg milk mixture on both sides
put the bread on a frying pan until golden brown and flip.
take off after golden brown and sprinkel sugar and cinnamon.

name: Yummy Low-Fat French Toast
directions: In shallow bowl, combine EGG BEATERS Original, milk, cinnamon and vanilla.
In nonstick skillet, over medium heat, melt 2 teaspoons margarine.
Dip bread slices in egg mixture to coat; transfer to skillet.
Brown about 3 minutes on each side.
Top with syrup if desired.

name: Low-Cal Stuffed French Toast
directions: Spread cream cheese on one side of 6 of the slices of bread. Spread preserves on one side of the other 6 slices. Pair them up making sandwiches.
Combine egg, egg whites, milk & vanilla in a shallow bowl w/ a whisk until smooth.
Heat electric griddle to 325, or place a regular griddle over medium-low heat on stove. Spray griddle w/ nonstick cooking spray.
Coat each side of the sandwiches w/ the egg mixture and cook for 2-3mins on each side or until golden brown. Top with SF syrup.

name: Night Before French Toast Casserole
directions: Grease a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
Cut bread into 1 inch slices and arrange in one layer in bottom of pan.
Beat eggs with remaining ingredients, except butter, and pour over bread in pan.
Cover with foil and refrigerate 4-36 hours. To bake, uncover pan, dot with butter, sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.
Bake at 350 degrees in center of oven for 45-50 minutes.
Remove and let stand for 5 minutes.
Serve with choice of syrup, honey, yogurt, or fresh fruit.

similar.name: French Toast Casserole With Honey Glazed Fruit

name: Simple French Toast
directions: Get as many as pieces of bread as you want.
Crack eggs and put in bottom of bowl. (as many as the number of bread).
Butter in the pan to cook so that the cinnamon doens't stick.
Chop off crust (if wanted).
Sprinkle salt and pepper with eggs.
Mix up well.
Dip bread in eggs till bread completely covered.
Put in pan and sprinkle cinnamon on both sides.
Fry till done.
ENJOY!

name: Betty Crocker's French Toast
directions: Mix eggs and milk in wide bowlb. Dip each slice of bread into mixture. Brown each slice on both sides on hot griddle.

name: Orange French Toast Made With Cinnamon Bread
directions: In a shallow bowl, combine the first six ingredients.  Dip both sides of bread into egg mixture; let soak for five minutes.  Place in a greased 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan.  Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Uncover, drizzle with butter.  Bake at 325 degrees F for 35-40 minutes or until browned.

name: Local French Toast
directions: Preheat PAM-greased pan.
Combine ingredients, then soak bread. Cook bread approximately 3 minutes on each side.

name: French Toast Casserole With Honey Glazed Fruit
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Lightly spray an 8-inch square baking pan with vegetable spray.
Place the bread with the cut side down  touching the bottom of the pan and the crust sides overlapping each other slightly. The sides should be almost flat. Set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, brown sugar, cinnamon and nutmeg.
Pour over the bread.
Using a spoon press down the bread to soak up the egg- milk mixture.
Spread fruit cocktail over the bread.
Drizzle with honey.
Dot with margarine.
Bake, uncovered, for 55 to 60 minutes, or untilcenter is set( doesn't jiggle when gently shaken),.
Let cool at least 10 minutes before cutting.
Make Ahead:.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate up to 10 hours.
Put cold casserole in a cold oven.
Set oven at 350F and bake for 65 to 70 minutes.

name: Breadless French Toast
directions: pre-heat oven to 425.
Put butter into pan (I used an 11x8 pan for 2 servings) and put pan in oven until butter is melted, then remove.
Mix flour, baking and cinnamon together. Add milk and mix well.
Add egg (one at a time if you are using more than 1 egg) and then add sugar and mix well.
Add vanilla. Cut up a banana into what ever size pieces you would like (I did slices in half), fold banana pieces into mixture.
Pour mixture into pan and bake for 15-20 minutes depending on how many eggs you used.
I topped mine with powdered sugar.

name: Low Carb Mock French Toast
directions: (1) Mix eggs, cream, sweetener and cinnamon.
(2) Crush pork rinds and mix with above mixture.
(3) Allow to soak until it becomes a very thick and goopy batter (3-5 minutes).
(4) Fry pancake style in butter until browned and flip over. Cook until done as you would french toast or pancakes.
Serve with any LC syrup or make your own as follows:.
(1) Cream butter until soft (use as much as you need for syrup). I melt it in the microwave.
(2) Add maple extract and sweetener to taste.

name: Cindy's Easy French Toast
directions: Heat 1 T. margarine or butter in a skillet over medium heat until melted.
Beat everything together but bread in a bowl.
Dip bread into egg mixture; cook until golden brown, about 4 minutes on each side.
OVEN METHOD:
Heat oven to 500 degrees.  Butter cookie sheet generously.

Beat eggs, milk, sugar and salt with fork.  Heat cookie sheet in oven 1 minute; remove from oven.  Dip gread into egg mixture; arrange on hot cookie sheet.  Drizzle any remaining egg mixture over bread.  BAke until bottoms are golden brown, 5 to 8 minutes.  Turn bread; bake until golden brown, 2 to 4 minutes.  Enjoy -- .

name: French Toast With Tomatoes
directions: Slice Tomato to your preferred thickness ( 1/2").
Beat 2 Eggs and Milk in a small flat bowl or pie plate
Dredge bread slices in mixture.
Heat skillet with Olive Oil.
Grill until brown.
Place Tomato slices on cooked french toast.
Seasoned with pepper to taste.

similar.name: French Toast Casserole With Honey Glazed Fruit
